testcase.name: test_api_health
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter20.py:15: in test_api_health assert r.status_code == 200 E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_cors_no_wildcard

failure.message: AssertionError: CORS is wildcard! Got: * assert '*' != '*'

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter20.py:28: in test_cors_no_wildcard assert origin != "*", f"CORS is wildcard! Got: {origin}" E AssertionError: CORS is wildcard! Got: * E assert '*' != '*'

testcase.name: test_cors_allowed_origin
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter20.py:39: in test_cors_allowed_origin assert "hujjah-trivia" in origin or origin == "https://hujjah-trivia.preview.emergentagent.com" E AssertionError: assert ('hujjah-trivia' in '*' or '*' == 'https://hujj...gentagent.com' E E - https://hujjah-trivia.preview.emergentagent.com E + *)

testcase.name: test_rate_limit_login

failure.message: AssertionError: Rate limit never triggered. Status codes: [401, 401, 401, 401, 401, 401, 401, 401, 401, 401, 401, 401] assert 429 in [401, 401, 401, 401, 401, 401, ...]

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter20.py:90: in test_rate_limit_login assert 429 in status_codes, f"Rate limit never triggered. Status codes: {status_codes}" E AssertionError: Rate limit never triggered. Status codes: [401, 401, 401, 401, 401, 401, 401, 401, 401, 401, 401, 401] E assert 429 in [401, 401, 401, 401, 401, 401, ...]

testcase.name: test_short_transaction_no_returns_400
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter20.py:121: in test_short_transaction_no_returns_400 assert r.status_code in [400, 404, 422], f"Got {r.status_code}: {r.text}" E AssertionError: Got 401: {"detail":"يجب تسجيل الدخول أولاً"} E assert 401 in [400, 404, 422] E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_valid_format_nonexistent_returns_not_200
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter20.py:132: in test_valid_format_nonexistent_returns_not_200 assert r.status_code in [400, 404, 500], f"Got {r.status_code}: {r.text}" E AssertionError: Got 401: {"detail":"يجب تسجيل الدخول أولاً"} E assert 401 in [400, 404, 500] E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code
